headline: Is It Time To Reassess Realty Income (O) After Its Recent Share Price Climb?
summary: If you are wondering whether Realty Income at around US$64.64 offers solid value or if you are paying up for its reputation as a monthly dividend REIT, this article breaks down what the current price might really reflect. The stock has returned 2.3% over the last 7 days, 0.9% over the last 30 days, 12.8% year to date and 17.1% over the past year, which has put it on the radar of investors reassessing its potential and risk profile. Recent market attention has focused on Realty Income's role...
